title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, June 11 2024
summary:
Main
Bulkers: S&P Values remained mostly stable this week
Capesize BC Cape Keystone (179,300 DWT, Dec 2011, Hyundai HI Ulsan) sold to unknown Chinese buyers for USD 32.50 mil, VV Value USD 34.4 mil
Supramax BC Protector St George (56,600 DWT, Jun 2011, COSCO Yangzhou) sold to undisclosed buyers for USD 14.00 mil (DD Due), VV Value USD 15.4 mil
Handy BC (Open Hatch) Sunshine (37,300 DWT, Feb 2009, Saiki) sold to unknown UAE buyers for USD 15.0 mil, VV Value USD 14 mil
Tankers: Tanker values remained stable across the board
MR2 (Chem/Prod) Alhena (52,400 DWT, May 2012, Guangzhou CSSC Longxue Shipbuilding) sold to unknown Greek buyers for USD 32.3 mil, VV Value USD 31.01 mil
J19 Stainless Steel MTM Antwerp (20,700 DWT, May 2004, Usuki Zosensho) sold to undisclosed buyers for USD 15 mil, VV Value USD 14.88 mil
Containers: Secondhand values appreciated across the board driven by higher earnings
Image reference: assets/2024-06-12_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-june-11-2024_img1_matrix-11th-june-2024_6acf15462038.jpg
